role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund will invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in swaps that utilize the Treasury Bond ETF as the reference asset and in shares of the Treasury Bond ETF. The fund is non-diversified.
